file_insights.purpose: Initial database migration for multi-tenant core module
key_content: Organization model as multi-tenant root entity
Custom User model with email-based authentication
Role and RolePermission models for RBAC
Session model for JWT token management
AuditLog model for system-wide audit trail
UserRole junction table with tenant scoping

file_insights.purpose: Makes migrations directory a Python package

file_insights.assumption: Models were pre-created before migration generation

file_insights.purpose: Settings configuration for core app integration

patterns_discovered.description: Organization as tenant root with cascading CASCADE deletes for data isolation
deleted_at timestamp fields with db_index for logical deletion without data loss
All models use UUID instead of auto-incrementing integers
patterns_discovered.benefit: Improved distributed system compatibility and ID unpredictability

patterns_discovered.description: created_at (auto_now_add) and updated_at (auto_now) on all models for audit trail
CharField with predefined choices and db_index for lifecycle management
Composite indexes on frequently queried field combinations
UniqueConstraint operations for composite unique fields
Hierarchical role-permission system with condition support

gotchas_discovered.description: Foreign key to subscriptions.Plan commented as deferred to separate migration
gotchas_discovered.reason: Subscriptions app doesn't exist yet; will be added in 0002_add_organization_plan.py
gotchas_discovered.risk: Circular dependency between apps during initial migration phase

gotchas_discovered.description: organization field is nullable (blank=True, null=True) for platform users
gotchas_discovered.implication: System supports both platform-level and tenant-level users
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Requires conditional logic in queries to distinguish user types

gotchas_discovered.description: Branch, User, Role cascade delete when Organization is deleted
gotchas_discovered.risk: Orphaned data in related apps (menu, orders, etc.) if not carefully cascaded
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Other apps must implement proper FK relationships with CASCADE

gotchas_discovered.description: Slug is unique per organization, not globally
gotchas_discovered.requirement: Query logic must always filter by organization context
gotchas_discovered.error_risk: Missing organization filter in queries could miss records or create conflicts

gotchas_discovered.description: User extends Django's AbstractBaseUser, keeping is_superuser and groups
gotchas_discovered.consideration: Mixes Django admin auth with custom RBAC system
gotchas_discovered.potential_conflict: Need clear separation between Django permissions and custom roles

gotchas_discovered.description: Condition JSONField for conditional permission evaluation
gotchas_discovered.complexity: Requires runtime evaluation logic; not enforced at DB level
gotchas_discovered.implementation_dependency: Application code must implement condition evaluation engine

gotchas_discovered.description: No TTL or archive policy defined in migration
gotchas_discovered.risk: Audit table will grow indefinitely without maintenance
gotchas_discovered.recommendation: Implement separate data retention policy and archival strategy

gotchas_discovered.assumption: Application is specific to Turkish market or regions
gotchas_discovered.risk: May need parameterization if expanding to other regions

approach_outcome.description: Initial core migrations generated and applied successfully
approach_outcome.approach_used: Manual migration generation with comprehensive documentation and constraints
approach_outcome.completeness: Full database schema for multi-tenant architecture implemented
verification_factors: All core models included: Organization, User, Branch, Role, Permission, Session
Proper foreign key relationships established with CASCADE delete patterns
Composite indexes optimized for common query patterns
RBAC foundation ready for role-permission assignment
Multi-tenant scoping enforced at schema level
dependencies_satisfied: Django auth.group and auth.permission dependency declared
Deferred organization.plan FK documented for future subscriptions app

recommendations.recommendation: Create 0002_add_organization_plan.py migration immediately after subscriptions app is created
recommendations.rationale: Deferred FK is blocking subscription feature implementation

recommendations.recommendation: Implement cascade delete handlers in other apps (menu, orders, etc.) for proper cleanup when Organization is deleted
recommendations.rationale: Current CASCADE pattern could leave orphaned records in other apps

recommendations.recommendation: Document and implement condition evaluation engine for RolePermission.condition JSONField
recommendations.rationale: Conditional permissions require runtime logic that isn't enforced at DB level

recommendations.recommendation: Add database views or materialized views for complex permission queries
recommendations.rationale: RBAC queries with conditions will require application-level joining across junction tables

recommendations.recommendation: Implement AuditLog retention policy and archival strategy
recommendations.rationale: Audit table will grow indefinitely without cleanup; regulatory compliance may require archival

recommendations.recommendation: Parameterize Branch.timezone default instead of hardcoding 'Europe/Istanbul'
recommendations.rationale: Improves portability if expanding to multiple regions or allowing configuration

recommendations.recommendation: Create ER diagram documenting multi-tenant data relationships and scoping boundaries
recommendations.rationale: Complex schema with many interdependencies; visual reference aids future development

recommendations.recommendation: Create factory fixtures for organization, branch, and user combinations for integration tests
recommendations.rationale: Multi-tenant patterns require testing across different tenant contexts
